_comment: Working base = true-stock Impulse 9.1.0 (Shopify CLI pull, rev 40d0dcd). owner: custom = ported Kansawala code, stock = untouched Impulse. The Kansawala custom sections have now been migrated in (Phase 1 foundation + Phase 2 sections). Check this manifest, not filenames, to tell stock vs custom.

hero-slider.note: Homepage hero carousel (self-contained; inline style + JS engine theme.HeroSlider).

marquee-strip.note: Scrolling marquee strip of trust phrases (self-contained).

trust-numbers.note: Trust/stat numbers section (self-contained; count-up via kw-sections.js). Wired into templates/page.about.json.

bestsellers.note: Tabbed bestsellers product grid (self-contained; inline tab engine).

three-sacred-metals.note: Kansa/Brass/Copper metal cards (self-contained; mobile slider engine).

b2b-trust.note: B2B client logos + testimonials + stat bands (self-contained; inline slider).

footer-kansawala.note: Custom footer section (self-contained; accordion JS in kw-sections.js). Wired as the active footer via sections/footer-group.json.

about-us-hero.note: About page hero (self-contained; CSS keyframe entrance + bg image preload). Wired via templates/page.about.json.

mission-quote.note: About page mission-quote band (self-contained). Wired via templates/page.about.json.

legacy-timeline.note: About page 75-year era timeline (self-contained; fade-up via [data-kw-fade-up] engine in kw-sections.js). Wired via templates/page.about.json.

craft-operations.note: About page 24-operations craft steps (self-contained; fade-up). Wired via templates/page.about.json.

our-values.note: About page core-values grid w/ SVG icons (self-contained; fade-up). Wired via templates/page.about.json.

vision-mission.note: About page vision & mission cards (self-contained; fade-up). Wired via templates/page.about.json.

sihor-workshop.note: About page Sihor workshop block w/ address + images (self-contained; fade-up via .ws-fu). Wired via templates/page.about.json.

about-cta.note: About page closing CTA w/ button blocks (self-contained). Wired via templates/page.about.json.

collection-page-header.note: Collections list-page header band (eyebrow + heading + body + pill blocks; self-contained). Wired via templates/list-collections.json.

all-collections-list.note: Curated collection-card grid for the /collections list page (block per collection; self-contained). Wired via templates/list-collections.json.

collection-seo-description.note: Collections list-page combined 2-column block: left = brand story + metal cards, right = Quick Facts table + FAQ accordion (with FAQPage JSON-LD). Self-contained. Wired via templates/list-collections.json.

kw-fonts.note: Loads Cormorant Garamond (Google Fonts); reuses theme Jost. Rendered in layout/theme.liquid <head>.

kw-schema-organization.note: Organization JSON-LD; rendered in <head> on the index template only.

kw-tokens.css.note: Kansawala design tokens (colors, spacing). Loaded in theme.liquid <head>.

kw-typography.css.note: Kansawala .t-* typography classes used by all custom sections. Loaded in theme.liquid <head>.

kw-sections.js.note: Custom section JS engines (hero-slider, fade-up, trust-numbers, three-sacred-metals, bestsellers tabs, b2b-trust, footer accordion), extracted verbatim from the old build's theme.js. Loaded after theme.js in theme.liquid. hero-slider self-boots here (the old build registered it via theme.sections.register inside theme.js); stock theme.js left untouched.

foundation.layout/theme.liquid: Surgically edited (+4 head lines after css-variables; +1 script after theme.js for kw-sections.js) to load kw-tokens.css, kw-typography.css, kw-fonts, kw-schema-organization (index only), and the kw-sections.js engines. Additive; stock structure intact.
foundation.templates/index.json: Replaced with the Kansawala homepage layout (15 custom sections in order). Prior stock/experiment homepage preserved in git history.
